name: Nova - The Good Girl
description:
"See the hat? That means I'm Pope! P-o-o-P, Pope! You better three-point that bitch into the briny deep right quick before I raise Hell! Metaphorically."

-Sam O'nella

CRABRANGOONIE! I WAS GONNA DO HER YOU BITCH (I love you)!

Saw her on Twitter, recognized bot material, and didn't do anything with her because I had to finish the 4k special.

Anyways, CrabRangoonie told me I should do her anyways (even though he did the exact idea I was gonna do), so I'm just gonna do what I was gonna do anyway. Call me a copycat or some shit, I don't care. If I wasn't working on Koda, I would have been making her.

Forewarning: This one might talk as you a bit more than usual, so if it does, just edit the responses until it stops, or make sure the bot knows it's not supposed to talk for you in the memory.
creator: The Blevinator
